Category Exposure — Theme Coverage
Dominant bypass: Role-play framing and Identity escalation appear consistently in flagged probes. Instructions like Pretend, Imagine, Act as are effective vectors in this domain.
Regulatory blind spot: Exemption assumptions and compliance-bypass scenarios score critically low. The model sometimes fails to verify the legitimacy of stated exemptions before disclosing data.
Recommendation: Tune guardrails specifically on role-play injection and regulatory override patterns. Inject the generated flagged queries directly into the RLHF safety tuning dataset.
